titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Dwight Hall, Yale University, Photographs
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.
This collection contains 11 published digital objects. And those objects are comprised of 17 digital files.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday July 6, 2023 at 07:24

did.abstract: The collection contains photographs of Dwight Hall at Yale, which was known as the Old Library from 1889 to 1930. Included are interior and exterior views and views of the building taken during the various stages of the construction or demolition of the surrounding structures.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 46-B (YRG 46-B), Records and materials documenting individual Yale buildings, facilities, and grounds.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Dwight Hall, Yale University, Photographs (RU 610). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The materials are arranged by topic.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection contains photographs of Dwight Hall at Yale, which was known as the Old Library from 1889 to 1930. Included are interior and exterior views and views of the building taken during the various stages of the construction or demolition of the surrounding structures.

did.unittitle: pre-1888 [1867? Earliest date advertised on back of Notman card; all the same photograph with differently cropped enlargements]

dao.linktitle: College Library from the Gym lot.
College Library from the Gym lot.

did.unittitle: pre-1888, before construction of Kent Chemistry Laboratory
1888-1890, after construction of Kent Chemistry Laboratory, background before removal of Philosophical Building
1888-1896, after construction of Kent Chemistry Laboratory, 1888, and before Woolsey Statue, 1896

dao.linktitle: Snow around the College Library (Old Library).
Snow around the College Library (Old Library).

descriptivenote.p: 1888-1896, after construction of Kent Chemistry Laboratory, 1888, and before Woolsey Statue, 1896

did.unittitle: pre-1890, before removal of Philosophical Building

dao.linktitle: Side of the old Library Building - Yale 1868.
Side of the old Library Building - Yale 1868.

descriptivenote.p: pre-1890, before removal of Philosophical Building

did.unittitle: post-1890, following construction of Kent and Chittenden
1896-1906, after Woolsey Statue, before Linsly Hall
post-1907, after addition of a floor to Kent Hall
post-1931, after removal of books to Sterling Library (1930) and renovation of the building

dao.linktitle: Dwight Hall and Chapel (Old Library), post 1931.
Dwight Hall and Chapel (Old Library), post 1931.

descriptivenote.p: post-1931, after removal of books to Sterling Library (1930) and renovation of the building

did.unittitle: post-1932, after construction of Jonathan Edwards College

dao.linktitle: View toward the altar in Dwight Memorial Chapel, post 1932.
View toward the altar in Dwight Memorial Chapel, post 1932.
Proposal for addition to the Old library.
Proposal for addition to the Old library.
